Geostorm (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $33,700,160Details
International Box Office $189,700,000
Worldwide Box Office $223,400,160
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,791,276
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,336,525
Total $7,127,801
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After an unprecedented series of natural disasters threatened the planet, the world’s leaders came together to create an intricate network of satellites to control the global climate and keep everyone safe. But now, something has gone wrong—the system built to protect the Earth is attacking it, and it’s a race against the clock to uncover the real threat before a worldwide geostorm wipes out everything…and everyone along with it.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,707,376 (40.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:15.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,246 opening theaters/3,246 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,931,065

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 20th, 2017 (Wide) by Warner Bros.

October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Thailand)

October 13th, 2017 (Wide) (Philippines)
Video Release: January 2nd, 2018 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for destruction, action and violence.

Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR

Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After an unprecedented series of natural disasters threatened the planet, the world’s leaders came together to create an intricate network of satellites to control the global climate and keep everyone safe. But now, something has gone wrong—the system built to protect the Earth is attacking it, and it’s a race against the clock to uncover the real threat before a worldwide geostorm wipes out everything…and everyone along with it.
